info.name: DebtFactory - Rule Engine (Not Eligible)
info.description: Rejection scenarios: zero banks. Asserts eligibility_status=NOT_ELIGIBLE + the failing reason.

exec: pm.test('status 200 (rejection is not an error)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
